== Notes for [[Item:Q114654|Q114654]] ==

https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ram%C3%B3n_I_de_Ribagorza_y_Pallars

Guinigenta Aznárez1

b. circa 860

Father Aznar Dato1 b. circa 830

Guinigenta Aznárez was born circa 860. She was the daughter of Aznar Dato.1 Guinigenta Aznárez married Ramón I, conde Ribagorza y Pallars, son of Lupo I, comte de Bigorre and N. N. de Toulouse; His 1st.1,2

Family

Ramón I, conde Ribagorza y Pallars b. circa 855?, d. circa 916

Child

Bernard I, conde de Ribagorza y Pallars+ b. c 885, d. a 9501

Citations

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 286-38.

[S1265] Genealogy.eu, online genealogy.euweb.cz, Counts of Bigorre, Ribagorza and Pailhars.

1 NAME Guinigenta (Gurisenda) De /Conflent/
2 GIVN Guinigenta (Gurisenda) De
2 SURN Conflent

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
